title: IRGC Launches 'Smart Control' Drills in Strait of Hormuz
detail: Iran's IRGC Navy begins large-scale maritime exercises codenamed 'Smart Control of the Strait of Hormuz' in the Persian Gulf, supervised by IRGC Commander Maj. Gen. Pakpour. Ultra-fast missile-launching vessels engage targets and missiles are fired from deep within Iran, coastal positions, and Persian Gulf islands. The drill is conducted near disputed islands claimed by the UAE, in a show of force timed one day before the Geneva nuclear talks.

title: Protests Restart in Western Iran
detail: Anti-government protest waves restart in western Iranian provinces, with demonstrations reported in Abdanan and other cities. An Iranian court sentences fourteen protesters to death in an online hearing. At least sixteen detained protesters receive death sentences, with multiple detainees reporting they were tortured and forced to sign confessions. UN experts demand transparency and accountability from Tehran.

title: Araghchi Meets IAEA Chief Grossi in Geneva
detail: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi meets IAEA Director-General Rafael Grossi in Geneva ahead of the second round of nuclear talks. Grossi reports 'in-depth technical discussions' and says the meeting is 'in preparation for important negotiations scheduled for tomorrow.' The meeting focuses on verification frameworks for any potential US-Iran deal, with Grossi serving as technical advisor to both sides.
